skos:definition.@value: erreichen, anlangen —, eintreffen bei; erreichen ihr Ende
gelangen zu; erreichen; einholen; nach allen Weltgegenden hin sich zerstreuen
to reach, arrive at, obtain, get, overpower

@graph.rdf:value:
<L>19416<pc>112,2<k1>aS<k2>aS<h>2<e>1
<hom>2.</hom> <s>aS</s> ¦ <s>aSnA/ti</s> (<ab>Pot.</ab> <s>aSnIyAt</s>; <ab>p.</ab> <s>aSna/t</s> (see <ab>s.v.</ab> <hom>1.</hom> <s>aSna</s>); <ab>aor.</ab> <ab>Subj.</ab> <s>aSIt</s>, <ls>RV. x, 87, 17</ls>; <ab>fut.</ab> <ab>p.</ab> <s>aSizya/t</s>, <ls>ŚBr.</ls>, <ab>perf.</ab> <s>A/Sa</s>, <ls>RV. i, 162, 9</ls> and <ls n="RV.">iii, 36, 8</ls>; <ab>perf.</ab> <ab>p.</ab> <s>ASivas</s> See <s>a/n-ASvas</s> <ab>s.v.</ab> <s>a/n-ASaka</s>; <ab>Pass.</ab> <ab>p.</ab> <s>aSya/mAna</s>, <ls>AV. xii, 5, 38</ls>)
<div n="to"/>to eat, consume (with <ab>acc.</ab> [this only in <lang>classical Sanskṛt</lang>] or <ab>gen.</ab>), <ls>RV.</ls> &c.;
<div n="to"/>to enjoy, <ls>Bhag. ix, 20</ls>, &c. :
<div n="vp"/><ab>Caus.</ab> <s>ASayati</s> (<ls>Pāṇ. i, 3, 87</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>; <ab>aor.</ab> <s>ASiSat</s>, <ls>ib.</ls> <ls n="Pāṇ.">i, 1, 59</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>)
<div n="to"/>to cause to eat, feed, <ls>Mn.</ls>;
<div n="vp"/> (with double <ab>acc.</ab>; <ab>cf.</ab> <ls>Pāṇ. i, 4, 52</ls>, <ls>Kāś.</ls>), <ls>BhP.</ls>;
<div n="vp"/> (<ab>cf.</ab> <s>A/Sita</s>) :
<div n="vp"/><ab>Desid.</ab> <s>a/SiSizati</s> (<ls>Pāṇ. vi, 1, 2</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>) to wish to eat, <ls>ŚBr.</ls>; <ls>ChUp.</ls> :
<div n="vp"/><ab>Intens.</ab> <s>aSASyate</s>, <ls>Pāṇ. iii, 1, 22</ls>; <ls>Pat.</ls><info whitneyroots="aS2,5"/><info verb="genuineroot" cp=""/>
<LEND>
